headline: João Gomes
body: 🚨🟣🔵 João Gomes will sign tomorrow at Aston Villa after medical following €40m plus €5m add-ons deal done. All agreed as reported in the morning while AVFC mantain contacts active also for João Palhinha.
raw_text:
🚨🟣🔵 João Gomes will sign tomorrow at Aston Villa after medical following €40m plus €5m add-ons deal done.

All agreed as reported in the morning while #AVFC mantain contacts active also for João Palhinha.
text:
🚨🟣🔵 Aston Villa have started working on new top winger after Manzambi and João Gomes deals while working on Estupinan at LB.

New winger targeted by #AVFC as Arsenal are prepared to attack for Morgan Rogers.

🎥➕ piped.video/TAvtz2rdKCw
draft_caption:
✅ TRANSFER- JOÃO VICTOR GOMES DA SILVA CONFIRMED PERMANENT TRANSFER FROM WOLVES TO ASTON VILLA.
💰 FEE — €40M
📝 CONTRACT — Contract length undisclosed

#AVFC #Wolves #TransferNews #PremierLeague
